ValidationRule.description: If there are assets with no daily prestarts, prevent in progressing.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( No_of_Assets_with_no_Pre_Starts__c > 0, OR( NOT(ISBLANK( Start_Date_Time__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( End_Date_Time__c )) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot proceed. There are assets with no daily pre-starts.
